villager.name: Villager
villager.description: A standard townsperson with no special powers. Your main weapon is your voice and your vote during the daytime phase.

werewolf.name: Werewolf
werewolf.description: An apex predator. You wake up every night with your pack to choose a villager to eliminate. Blend in during the day!

seer.name: Seer
seer.description: A powerful mystic. Once per night, you can inspect one player to reveal whether they are a Villager or a Werewolf.
